paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93, which represents a 5.12 percent decrease from the prior close and a 31.52 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price quote is as of July 16, 2026.

There are 2 new news headlines in the last 24 hours, both from Yahoo Finance, dated July 16, 2026. One headline mentions that Fermi stock may be above fair value after a note offering, while the other discusses whether a convertible push exposes deeper governance tensions around Project Matador.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and one SCHEDULE 13D/A form. The filings disclose the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
